title: pedicularis oederi subsp. heteroglossa
intro: Pedicularis oederi subsp. heteroglossa is a plant species belonging to the lousewort family, characterized by its unique flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pedicularis oederi subsp. heteroglossa include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote the removal of mucus, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
